home.hero_subtitle: Detect dangerous multi-drug interaction cascades — not just direct pairwise conflicts — using a knowledge graph built on real FDA/pharmacological data.
home.feature_cascade_desc: Traces CYP450 enzyme pathway chains, not just pairwise lookups
home.feature_evidence_desc: Every interaction backed by FDA FAERS adverse event counts
home.feature_scoring_desc: Four severity tiers: minor, moderate, major, critical
home.feature_data_desc: Seeded from DrugBank, OpenFDA FAERS, and RxNorm

checker.title: Drug Interaction Checker
checker.subtitle: Enter your medications to check for interactions and cascade effects.
checker.search_placeholder: Search for a medication (e.g. Warfarin, Aspirin)...
checker.add_hint_0: Add at least 2 medications to check interactions.
checker.add_hint_1: Add 1 more medication to check interactions.

disclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: This software is for informational and educational purposes only. MEDGRAPH is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice. Always consult a licensed pharmacist or physician before making any medication decisions.
disclaimer.short: For informational purposes only. Not medical advice. Always consult your healthcare provider before making any medication decisions.
disclaimer.full_p1: MEDGRAPH is provided for informational and educational purposes only. The information presented does not constitute medical advice and is not a substitute for professional medical judgment, diagnosis, or treatment.
disclaimer.full_p2: Always seek the advice of your physician, pharmacist, or other qualified healthcare provider with any questions you may have regarding drug interactions, medications, or medical conditions. Never disregard professional medical advice or delay seeking it because of something you have read on this platform.
disclaimer.full_p3: Drug interaction data is based on publicly available databases (DrugBank, OpenFDA, RxNorm) and may not be complete or current. Always verify with your healthcare provider.

voice.not_supported: Voice input not supported in this browser.

offline.message: You are currently offline. Some features may be limited.
